abstract: Program evaluation serves as a systematic process for gathering critical data on organizational implementation and decision-making frameworks. This study utilizes a comprehensive literature review of academic journals and e-books to provide a roadmap for educators tasked with assessing institutional initiatives. Our findings highlight that a rigorous analysis of evaluation outcomes is essential for determining the reach and efficacy of school programs from previous years. Furthermore, by situating these evaluations within the context of current educational policies, this research offers a strategic benchmark for quality assurance. Ultimately, these results provide a foundational framework for both administrators and supervisors to analyze past performance and dictate the trajectory of future school improvements.
